action.reasoning: Observation: Training fails with ModuleNotFoundError for xgboost (model.py defines XGBRegressor with MAE objective, hist method, early stopping params; train/predict.py ready per history; best MAE still 0.2188 from RF iter6, MLP 0.231). Iter7 curve shows smooth convergence but FP+tree ensemble is the limit for current approach. Analysis: xgboost not preinstalled (despite being allowed); packages_to_install must be explicitly set in JSON (persists after install). XGB with reg:absoluteerror + early_stop on val should beat RF (~0.15-0.19 MAE expected on Morgan FP r=3 for QM9 gap). FP calc time ~3-5min acceptable with 1.8h/13 iters left. No code bugs. Decision: Install xgboost via packages_to_install, run current train.py (full CSV data, logs val_mae to metrics.jsonl, saves best.pkl), submit_eval on best.pkl for test MAE score + timing before trying Mordred feats or 3D GNNs.
